action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace and no baseline yet. Analysis: need a fast end-to-end pipeline with immediate eval per instructions, while using all 4 GPUs. Decision: implement a strong CLIP ViT-B/16 image encoder classifier with region-aware balanced sampling, weighted loss, simple TTA-ready predict script, and run a short 2-epoch DDP baseline before submitting eval.
